name: Black Coral Yoga
location: Hanalei Center, 5-5161 Kuhio Hwy Suite 204E, Hanalei (North Shore)
highlights: The anchor yoga studio on Kauai's North Shore — voted #1 yoga studio on the island
Ashtanga lineage in a historic building with wraparound lanai and mountain and waterfall views of Hanalei
Infrared Vinyasa, Yin, Restorative, Athletic Sculpt, Meditation (Vipassana tradition), Breathwork, and Sound Bath
World-class teaching team — serious practitioners who make the practice accessible to all levels
Advance registration required; popular morning classes sell out
bookingWindow: Advance registration required at blackcoralyoga.com — book morning classes 12+ hrs ahead

name: Anara Spa at Grand Hyatt Kauai
location: Grand Hyatt Kauai Resort & Spa, Poipū (South Shore)
highlights: The island's most developed spa — built around genuine Hawaiian healing traditions, not just a hotel amenity
Lomilomi massage (traditional Hawaiian bodywork using continuous flowing strokes) and pohaku hot stone therapy
Day access available for non-guests who book a treatment — one of the best spa day options on the island
Outdoor treatment hales (huts), lava rock soaking pools, and a waterfall hydrotherapy circuit
bookingWindow: Book at hyatt.com or call directly — day access requires treatment booking

name: Limahuli Garden & Preserve
highlights: NTBG property on ancient Hawaiian agricultural terraces — among the most intact in the state
Walking the terraces through native plant collections is a genuinely restorative practice — the landscape carries 1,000+ years of cultivation
Self-guided and guided tours available; guided tours provide deep context on Hawaiian ethnobotany and land stewardship
The stream corridor and valley backdrop make this the most meditative natural environment on the North Shore
bookingWindow: Book guided tours at ntbg.org — self-guided tours available Tue–Sat 9:30am–4pm

name: Kayaking the Wailua River
highlights: The only navigable river in Hawaii — sacred to Native Hawaiians as a highway connecting mountain to sea
Guided kayak to Uluwehi (Secret) Falls — a two-tier waterfall accessible only by paddle and short hike
Multiple operators offer guided half-day tours; kayak rentals available for self-guided exploration
One of the most consistently rewarding half-day experiences on the island
bookingWindow: Book guided tours through operators like Kayak Wailua or Ali'i Kayaks
hours: Morning departures recommended; book 1–2 days ahead

name: Stand-Up Paddleboarding — Hanalei Bay
highlights: Summer (May–September) flat-water SUP on a protected crescent bay — one of the most beautiful in Hawaii
Green sea turtles (honu) visible in the shallow reef areas — the most accessible turtle encounter on the North Shore
Multiple rental operators around the bay; board and paddle available by the hour
Morning is glassiest; afternoon trade winds pick up
bookingWindow: Rentals available walk-in from multiple operators at the bay
hours: Rental operators open daily; morning recommended
